channel.title: Mcp on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in Mcp on ZAP

item.title: Scanning MCP Servers with ZAP
item.description: ZAP can now scan MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers as a first-class target. Import an MCP server from the ZAP desktop or the Automation Framework, or run the new action-mcp-scan GitHub Action to scan one from CI.

item.title: The ZAP MCP Server
item.description: Connect AI assistants like Claude and ChatGPT to ZAP via the Model Context Protocol. Start scans, read alerts, and explore your application—all through natural conversation.

item.title: Enhancing ZAP with AI for Bug Bounty Hunting
item.description: Building an intelligent security testing system that leverages ZAP’s automation capabilities and machine learning to improve vulnerability detection
